if you go by the store can you grab batteries and also the dog got muddy down by the culvert again so maybe towels too bc im not doing another full floor cleanup tonight
the county guy came out and looked at the culvert for maybe four minutes and then left which i think is officially called an inspection now
dont send the kids by the culvert path after dark again bc one of them already came back saying they lost a shoe and i am not going shoe hunting in ditch water

they moved practice back bc the culvert flooded the edge of the field again and now all the parents are doing that thing where they complain like this is new information

dont park by the culvert when it rains i know it looks fine until suddenly it doesnt and then everyones standing around giving bad advice
the trail by the culvert smells weird again and i dont need anyone explaining nature to me bc this is not a nature smell its a problem smell

i found the ball by the culvert which is where every ball on this property eventually goes like its some kind of final destination for sports equipment
maintenance wants another pic of the culvert before they open the ticket and i just want to say i take way too many photos of drainage now for a person with other responsibilities

if you take the back way by the culvert just know theres mud all over it and one truck parked half in the road for no reason that i can understand
the dog keeps trying to climb down by the culvert like theres something interesting down there and maybe there is but i would prefer not to find out with my own hands

i know he said shortcut but driving through by the culvert when its wet is not a shortcut its just making future paperwork

if youre already out can you get cat food and also maybe dont use the road by the culvert unless you enjoy guessing where pavement stops

dont put the birthday chairs on the culvert side of the yard again bc every pic from last year has one kid smiling and one dark drainage hole in the background

the culvert is the new excuse for everything now. late practice? culvert. muddy shoes? culvert. bad mood? probably somehow also culvert

please stop calling it a creek its a culvert with marketing and everyone knows it
